title: Bird feeder with elastomeric perch
abstract: A bird feeder is provided having a seed reservoir with a plurality of seed ports and a perch assembly mounted to the seed reservoir that includes a mounting structure and one or more cantilever elastomeric perches, each perch having an elongated flexible body. The anchored end of the perch is secured to the mounting structure and the free end extends in a substantially horizontal orientation from the seed reservoir. The flexible body of the perch can support the weight of a bird but will bend downwardly toward a vertical orientation in response to the weight of a squirrel. Once the rodent has been dislodged by the bending action of the perch, the flexible body thereof will return to the substantially horizontal orientation through elastomeric memory.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A bird feeder comprising: a seed reservoir having at least one seed port; and a perch assembly mounted to the seed reservoir, the perch assembly including a mounting structure and at least one cantilever elastomeric perch, the perch having an anchored end secured to the mounting structure and a free end extending in a substantially horizontal orientation from the seed reservoir, the elastomeric perch having a flexible body that can support a bird landing thereon but that will bend toward a vertical orientation when subjected to a squirrel's weight to dislodge the squirrel, after which the perch will return to the substantially horizontal orientation through elastomeric memory. 2. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 1, wherein the elastomeric perch is made of 70 Durometer Shore A EPDM rubber (ethylene propylene diene monomer (M class) rubber) . 3. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 1, wherein the elastomeric perch is made of 70 Durometer Shore A rubber urethane . 4. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 1, wherein the mounting structure includes an annular ring having spaced apertures and a support arm adjacent each aperture, the support 

arm having a central bore aligned with the respective aperture through which the flexible body of the perch extends. 5. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 1, wherein the anchored end of the perch includes a gripping element. 6. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 5, wherein the gripping element includes a ball-shaped head. 7. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 4, wherein the anchored end of the perch includes an annular flange that remains inside the annular ring when the perch is mounted to prevent further distal movement. 8. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 1, wherein the mounting structure includes an elastomeric band integrally molded with the at least one elastomeric perch, the band fitting around the seed reservoir with a friction fit and positioning the perch adjacent the at least one seed port. 9. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 8, wherein the seed reservoir has a rectangular cross section and the elastomeric band is rectangular. 10. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 8, wherein the seed reservoir is cylindrical and the elastomeric band is circular, forming a ring around the seed reservoir. 11. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 1, wherein the mounting structure includes a mounting base secured to the seed reservoir, the anchored end of the perch having a mounting head that is removably received within a receptacle formed in the mounting base. 12. The bird feeder as set forth in claim 1, wherein the mounting structure includes a mounting base secured to the seed reservoir, the mounting base including an arm that forms a slot within which the anchored end of the perch is secured. 13. A perch assembly for a bird feeder having a seed reservoir with at least one seed port, the perch assembly comprising : a cantilever elastomeric perch with a substantially horizontal orientation when fixed at an anchored end to the seed reservoir, the elastomeric perch having a flexible body that can support a bird landing thereon but that will bend toward a vertical orientation when subjected to a squirrel's weight to dislodge the squirrel, after which the perch will return to the 

substantially horizontal orientation through elastomeric memory; and a mounting member for securing the elastomeric perch to the seed reservoir. 14. The perch assembly as set forth in claim 13, wherein the mounting member includes an elastomeric band integrally molded with the elastomeric perch, the band fitting around the seed reservoir with a friction fit and positioning the perch adjacent the at least one seed port. 15. The perch assembly as set forth in claim 14, wherein the seed reservoir has a rectangular cross section and the elastomeric band is rectangular. 16. The perch assembly as set forth in claim 14, wherein the seed reservoir is cylindrical and the elastomeric band is circular, forming a ring around the seed reservoir. 17. The perch assembly as set forth in claim 13, wherein the mounting member includes a mounting base secured to the seed reservoir, the perch having a mounting head that is removably received within a receptacle formed in the mounting base to secure the perch to the seed reservoir. 18. The perch assembly as set forth in claim 13, wherein the mounting member includes a mounting base secured to the seed reservoir, the mounting base including an arm that forms a slot within which the anchored end of the perch is removably secured.
